title: Escape the Backrooms (ETB)
description: Mod for items, monsters, and blocks from The Backrooms.
body:
![ESCAPE THE BACKROOMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90dc5d98b8899f3a2d018c656876c0490f5ae13d.png)

_~~You better be careful, because they're waiting for you...~~_

**Geckolib is required!**

This mod is designed to create maps, it does not generate new dimensions or add crafting items.

### **_Did you want to play The Backrooms in  minecraft?_**
**This mod will not add it, however, it will add various monsters and a variety of blocks from The Backrooms.**

This mod adds new monsters from The Backrooms like Bacteria. There are also various types of decoration blocks available for building your maps. There are various effects, such as death from lack of sanity, which can be replenished with items from the mod. Different sounds and much more, especially for you!

_**The mod is updated regularly, this is my first mod, but I'm trying to make it cooler.**_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. In version 0.6, the sanity system will be completely redesigned.

2. All monsters and blocks for level 1 will be released on version 1.0.

</details>
